rationale: Single canonical PSA thresholds for the PokeGrade engine. The centering ladder is extracted verbatim from the web app's grading.ts system prompt; the SKIP/borderline thresholds encode the approved /office-hours design. The engine (centering.py, verdict.py) and the Claude adjudication prompt both read this file so the two never drift. worse_pct = the larger border share on the worse axis (e.g. 58/42 -> 58.0).

front.rationale: 55/45 or better is PSA-10 eligible. 56/44-60/40 is the PSA-9 borderline zone. Worse than 60/40 removes a 10 from consideration outright. Because PokeGrade answers 'will this gem a 10?', the verdict treats ANY measured, high-confidence worse-axis past ten_eligible_max_pct (55) as a deterministic 10-killer -> SKIP; past skip_threshold_pct (60) the cap is egregious and flagged CENTERING_OUT_OF_BOUNDS.

back.rationale: Backs are far more forgiving: 75/25 or better keeps a 10 in play. The back is rarely the limiting axis and is not a SKIP gate on its own in v1.

weakest_link.rationale: The overall ceiling is the minimum across the four pillars (Centering, Corners, Edges, Surface), never an average. Centering is evaluated first because it is the only deterministically measurable pillar.

soft_pillars.rationale: Corners, edges, and surface are adjudicated by Claude from the flat shots at a conservative could_not_assess default. A photo shows the absence of OBVIOUS defects, not flawlessness. Surface is the dominant hidden cap for modern foils (micro-scratches under raking light) and is honestly degraded to in-hand-only on heavily etched SIRs.

ev.rationale: EV-aware: a tiny 9-vs-10 spread is not worth the grading fee even at high 10-odds. When spread_9_10 and fee are both provided and spread_9_10 <= fee, the card is 'not worth' -> SKIP regardless of condition. ev_estimate = spread_9_10 - fee (the marginal value of a successful 9->10 upgrade, net of fee).

verdict.audit_rationale: A random sample of SKIP / IN_HAND_CHECK predictions is flagged for occasional real submission so over-skipping (selection bias) stays measurable in the ledger.
